characters.name: Aliens
characters.description: The Aliensare characters in "CatDog and the Great Parent Mystery". The aliens are extra-terrestrials who abduct people and use them on experiments. They are purple humanoid aliens with one eye, antennaes, andproboscis-like mouths. They wear dark blue suits and carry rods as weapons. The aliens use a spaceship as their vessel. They are first seen when their victims are returning from the spaceship to their relatives on a toilet shaped structure on the site of a rest area. WhenCatDogwent to their spaceship in hops of finding their parents, they attempt to capture them but with Dog playing with the controls as the ship launched, they are launched around the dome. Unable to stop CatDog, the aliens abandon their ship and escaped into escape pods withWinslow. They are not seen again afterwards.

characters.name: Alley-cats
characters.description: The alley-cats are a group of 5 cats who travel from town to town, bringing along their alley. They only appeared in one episode calledCat Gone Bad. They are a parody of hippies, shown to care little about what others think of them and using words like "hip" and "squares-burg". Catrina - One of the alley-cats is a female with brown fur, brown hair, and a purple nose. She wears a black beret, brown lipstick, a blue shirt, and long black pants. She is the only female member in the group.

characters.name: Balloon Guy
characters.description: The Balloon Guyis a minor character in "Talking Turkey". The Balloon Guy is one of the balloon holders of a Mean Bob balloon. WhenWaltruns through the balloon holders, all of them except him let go, while he still holds on to the balloon which has went up in the air. He is seen in few more times when Cat chases Walt, the Greasers playing football and the last shot in the episode. His appearances after the parade is a recurring gag in the episode.

characters.name: Bank Robbers
characters.description: The Bank Robbers are minor characters in CatDog. Their first appearance is Silents Please! Due to colorblind and laryngitis, they are very quiet so they sneak around to steal money from CatDog. Appearance They resemble Cat and Dog. They wear berets and a sweater and a tank and masks. Due to colorblind and laryngitis and no one voicing them, they can't have dialogue or say anything.

characters.name: Bartholomew
characters.description: Bartholomew in science class BartholomewisLube's nephew. He's very educated unlike his uncle Lube who isn't verysmart. Bartholomew is voiced byCarlos Alazraquiwho alsovoices Lube. Bartholomew's only appearance was in "Back to School". He speaks with an upper class British accent.

characters.name: Beach Rat
characters.description: TheBeach Ratis a background character. The Beach Rat seems to serve a function akin to that of the angry old man, that is chastising anyone who bugs him. The Beach Rat seems to serve a function akin to that of the angry old man, that is chastising anyone who bugs him.

characters.name: Bessie the Lake Monster
characters.description: Bessieis a mysterious lake monster that dwells underneath a frozen lake far fromNearburg. She is voiced byFrank Welker.

characters.name: Biff
characters.description: Biff FeltbottomisCliff's nephew.  His only appearance is in "Back to School". Aside from Cliff being his uncle, his grandfather and a cousin his relatives are unknown. He’s known as one of the cool kids in the school.

characters.name: Carny
characters.description: Carnyis a frequently recurring background character. He is voiced byJim Cummings. The carny had a number of background appearances, even beyond scenes with multiple Nearburgers. One example would be inEscape from the Deep Endwhere he is one ofRancid Rabbit's prisoners. He had his only speaking role inFishing for Trouble, where he runs a stall at a carnival that Dog plays and gives himVeronicaas a prize for winning.

characters.name: Cat
characters.description: Felinius "Feline Cat" Meow Caticusis one of the two protagonists inCatDog. He is voiced byJim Cummings, who also voiced various characters for Disney, Nickelodeon (and Paramount), and Cartoon Network (and Warner Bros.).

characters.name: Cat
characters.description: Felinius "Feline Cat" Meow Caticusis one of the two protagonists inCatDog. He is voiced byJim Cummings, who also voiced various characters for Disney, Nickelodeon (and Paramount), and Cartoon Network (and Warner Bros.).

characters.name: Cat Lives
characters.description: TheCat Livesare the main antagonists of "Nine Lives." Dogdiscovers a box while cleaning the attic. He opens the box and finds a set of bottles. He drinks one of the bottles.Cattakes the bottle away from Dog and tells him that Cat has eight other lives. Dog spits out Cat's extra life. The extra life opens the other bottles, freeing the rest of the extra lives. They leave CatDog's house and go toNearburg. The extra lives wreak havoc in Nearburg. They steal groceries fromRancid's Market. Cat Life 4 putsthe Greasersin wet concrete. Cat Life 3 drinksMr. Sunshine'smilk. The extra lives meow "I've Been Working on the Railroad" on a power line. They create a massive power surge that burns Earth.

characters.name: Clifford
characters.description: Clifford Maurice Feltbottom, often called by his nickname,Cliff, is the macho but dimwitted leader of theGreaser Dogsand one of the main antagonists of the show. Look at him wrong, and he'll pound you with his cinder-block-like bulldog paw. He may pound you even if you look at himright. Fortunately, Cliff's got the mental capacity of a pack of dog biscuits, so he's easily outsmarted. He enjoys beating upCatDog. Cliff is often annoyed byEddie the Squirrel, who longs to be a greaser dog like him. Cliff is 20 years old. He likes pounding CatDog, but he dislikes CatDog (mostly Cat), people who try to be smarter than him, and all cats (with a few exceptions such as female ones). He’s voiced byTom Kenny, who also portraysDog.

characters.name: Coach Feltbottom
characters.description: Coach FeltbottomisCatDog's old gym teacher atNearburg High School. He's alsoCliff's dad andBiff's and Cliff's niece's grandfather. His only appearance on the show was in a flashback in "Back to School". However, he did make a return appearance in the show's TV movie "CatDog and the Great Parent Mystery".

characters.name: Cornelius Sunshine
characters.description: Cornelius Sunshineis a supporting character in CatDog and a green-skinned, shirtless creature with a human-like head, a thin, once-coiled tail and no apparent emotions, who has a monotone voice and demeanor very similar to the actor Ben Stein. His name is ironically the very opposite of his personality, and he often nods off and falls asleep in the middle of doing things, such as performing a (very unengaging) magic act. It is suggested that his sardonic and pessimistic personality may beDog's fault. Very little is known about him. Thus it is apparent that not even the characters in the show know what he is. No matter how big and shiny the silver lining is, Mr. Sunshine can find the dark cloud behind it. Ten minutes with Mr. Sunshine and anyone will go from being on top of the world to crouching under their desk hugging their teddy bear. He is a recurring character in the series and appears in many episodes, though is not as important as the main characters and some of the other recurring characters with larger roles. Mr. Sunshine lives in a cave under CatDog's house.

characters.name: Crocodile
characters.description: TheCrocodileis a character in the episode "The Golden Hydrant". The Crocodile is a large dark green reptile living in the sewers beneath the museum that housed the Golden Hydrant. It was first seen when Eddie was being dropped into three crocodiles, though Eddie survived the attack.

characters.name: Dad
characters.description: Frog Dadis a minor character in CatDog andCatandDog's adoptive father andMom's husband. He’s a frog with a big nose and Cat takes after his side of the family. He‘s voiced by Billy Bob Thorton.

characters.name: Dalmatian
characters.description: TheDalmatianis a character in "Firedog" and "Trespassing". The Dalmatian wears a firefighter hat. He shows hostility to strangers. Rancid and the firefighters takes care of him very well.

characters.name: Damsel
characters.description: Damsel is a minor character inCatDog. Her first appearance is "Silents Please!". She is tied to the ropes by Snidely and CatDog knocks him away and rescues her, but it's part of a filming set.CatDogputs her back on the tracks and leaves with her getting run over by a train. She resembles the Ingrid Twins.

characters.name: DanStan
characters.description:
DanielStaniel "DanStan"is an antagonist who only appeared in the episodeCatDog Squared. Daniel "Dan" is a cat and Staniel "Stan" is a dog. They are both scam artists who tried to scam CatDog andThe Greasers. Their schemes involve gaining the trust of others and then abusing it until the person they are scamming has no money left. They then steal something and leave before being caught. In the episodeCatDog Squared, they pretend to be a catdog in order to abuse Cat's hospitality and trust. They try to steal CatDog's Tug-Of-War trophy, but fail when CatDog figure out what they really are.
Later, they try to scam The Greasers by pretending to be a huge dog. The Greasers figure out right away what they are and kick them out.

characters.description: Dixieis a one-time character in "Firedog". Dixie is a cow owned byMr. Sunshine.

characters.name: Dunglap
characters.description: Dunglapis on ofCatDog's best friends and is a minor character inCatDog. He is used as a background character. He works at theTaco Depot, and was recently promoted to manager in "All You Can't Eat". He just makes a few minor appearances here and there, he's a very calm and nice guy type character. He hangs around a lot withMervis, his friend. Even though he and Mervis are friends, they often fight with each other like CatDog does. He has suffered tons and tons of injuries in the show.

characters.description: Friends Eddie the Squirrelis a recurring character voiced byDwight Schultz.

characters.name: Feline
characters.description: Feline(pronounce Fe-leen) is the main antagonist of the episode "The Cat Club". She owns and runs the Cat Club, with her goals being the elimination of all dogs, and anyone who associated themselves with dogs. She created this machine which resembles a giant vacuum. Its purpose was to suck up all dogs and their associates, although it was unclear what Feline was planning to do to the dogs after capturing them. It can be assumed that she was either going to make them into slaves, or keep them locked up. Feline has grey fur with brown hair. She has red lipstick, a red dress, and black high heels. Her nose is also purple like Dog's.

characters.name: Fleas
characters.description: The Fleas partying in Cat's skin. TheFleasare characters in the episode "Flea or Die!". The fleas are parasites that used to reside on theRat. WhenCatDogwas seen by an individual flea they transfer to Cat. As a result of this Cat and Dog visitRancidfor treatment, in this case they wear a flea belt.

characters.name: Fred the Flying Fish (character)
characters.description: File:Freddy The Flying Fish.jpeg Fred the Flying Fishis a character in the episode of thesame name. CatDogtries to search for Fred the flying fish, and CatDog falls down from the chasm, Fred catches CatDog to fast, saving their lives. He likes to eats flying worms, then Cat sold out Fred toRancid Rabbit. Later, CatDog decided to see Fred for one time at the circus, and they saw Fred in chains, and CatDog decided to save Fred, and Fred flies around and he swallow Rancid in whole, and he eat all the money from CatDog and later he spits out Rancid.
